description: Add missing Storybook stories for defined-but-untested CVA variants in the retro design system — Alert solid variant, Loader muted variant, Button icon size, Text anchor/list-item variants, and Tooltip positioning variants.

userStories.title: Add solid variant and fix argTypes in Alert stories
userStories.description: Alert defines a `variant: 'solid'` in its CVA config but no story renders it. The argTypes in the story meta also don't expose the variant control.
acceptanceCriteria: Alert.stories.tsx has a story named `Solid` rendering `<Alert variant="solid">`
Alert.stories.tsx has a story named `AllVariantsAndStatuses` showing a matrix of variant x status combinations
The meta argTypes include `variant: { control: 'select', options: ['default', 'solid'] }`

userStories.title: Add muted variant and fix argTypes in Loader stories
userStories.description: Loader defines `variant: 'muted'` in its CVA config but no story renders it, and the argTypes omit 'muted' from the options list.
acceptanceCriteria: Loader.stories.tsx has a story named `Muted` rendering `<Loader variant="muted" />`
The meta argTypes variant options include 'muted': `options: ['default', 'secondary', 'outline', 'muted']`
The AllVariants story includes the muted variant row
userStories.notes:
Files:
- platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/retro/Loader.stories.tsx (add story + fix argTypes)

Context:
Loader CVA config in Loader.tsx (lines 6-24):
```tsx
const loaderVariants = cva('flex gap-1', {
  variants: {
    variant: {
      default: '[&>div]:bg-primary [&>div]:border-border',
      secondary: '[&>div]:bg-secondary [&>div]:border-border',
      outline: '[&>div]:bg-transparent [&>div]:border-border',
      muted: '[&>div]:bg-muted-foreground [&>div]:border-muted-foreground',
    },
    ...
```

Current argTypes in stories (line 8):
```tsx
argTypes: {
  variant: { control: 'select', options: ['default', 'secondary', 'outline'] },
  ...
```
Missing 'muted'.

Current AllVariants story (line 24) iterates:
```tsx
{(['default', 'secondary', 'outline'] as const).map(variant => (
```
Missing 'muted'.

Changes:
1. Fix argTypes: add 'muted' to variant options:
```tsx
variant: { control: 'select', options: ['default', 'secondary', 'outline', 'muted'] },
```

2. Add `Muted` story:
```tsx
const Muted: Story = { args: { variant: 'muted' } };
```

3. Update AllVariants to include 'muted':
```tsx
{(['default', 'secondary', 'outline', 'muted'] as const).map(variant => (
```

4. Add `Muted` to exports.

Constraints:
- Follow existing story patterns
- Do NOT modify Loader.tsx

userStories.title: Add icon size story to Button stories
userStories.description: Button defines `size: 'icon'` in its CVA config but no story renders it. The AllVariants matrix only iterates sm/md/lg, skipping icon.
acceptanceCriteria: Button.stories.tsx has a story named `Icon` rendering a button with `size="icon"` containing an SVG icon
The AllVariants story includes 'icon' in its size iteration
userStories.notes:
Files: - platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/retro/Button.stories.tsx (add story + update AllVariants) Context: Button CVA config in Button.tsx (lines 7-33): ```tsx size: { sm: 'px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow hover:shadow-none', md: 'px-4 py-1.5 text-base', lg: 'px-6 lg:px-8 py-2 lg:py-3 text-md lg:text-lg', icon: 'p-2', }, ``` The `icon` size is `p-2` — a square button intended for icon-only use. The existing argTypes already include 'icon' in the options (line 11): ```tsx size: { control: 'select', options: ['sm', 'md', 'lg', 'icon'] }, ``` But the AllVariants story (line 32) only iterates sm/md/lg: ```tsx {(['sm', 'md', 'lg'] as const).map(size => ( ``` Changes: 1. Add `Icon` story. Use an inline SVG or a simple unicode symbol to represent an icon: ```tsx const Icon: Story = { render: () => (
{(['default', 'secondary', 'outline'] as const).map(variant => ( ))}
), }; ``` 2. Update AllVariants to include 'icon' size. Since 'icon' size renders empty without children, render it separately with an icon symbol inside: Change the size iteration to `['sm', 'md', 'lg', 'icon']` and use a conditional: for 'icon' size show an arrow, for others show the size label. 3. Add `Icon` to exports. Constraints: - Follow existing story patterns - Use inline SVG (no external icon library imports needed — the project uses lucide-react but importing it in stories is fine too) - Do NOT modify Button.tsx

userStories.title: Add anchor and list-item variant stories and fix argTypes in Text stories
userStories.description: Text defines `as: 'a'` (with hover:underline styling) and `as: 'li'` variants but no story renders them. The argTypes also omit these two options.
acceptanceCriteria: Text.stories.tsx has a story named `Anchor` rendering `<Text as="a">` with visible underline-on-hover styling
Text.stories.tsx has a story named `ListItem` rendering `<Text as="li">`
The AllHeadings story is updated to include `a` and `li` variants
The meta argTypes include 'a' and 'li' in the as options
userStories.notes:
Files: - platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/retro/Text.stories.tsx (add stories + fix argTypes) Context: Text CVA config in Text.tsx (lines 6-23): ```tsx const textVariants = cva('font-head', { variants: { as: { p: 'font-sans text-base', li: 'font-sans text-base', a: 'font-sans text-base hover:underline underline-offset-2 decoration-primary', h1: 'text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold', ... ``` Current argTypes (line 7 of stories): ```tsx argTypes: { as: { control: 'select', options: ['p', 'h1', 'h2', 'h3', 'h4', 'h5', 'h6'] } }, ``` Missing 'a' and 'li'. Current AllHeadings story (lines 15-27) iterates h1-h6 and p but not a or li. Changes: 1. Fix argTypes to include all variants: ```tsx argTypes: { as: { control: 'select', options: ['p', 'h1', 'h2', 'h3', 'h4', 'h5', 'h6', 'a', 'li'] } }, ``` 2. Add `Anchor` story: ```tsx const Anchor: Story = { args: { as: 'a', children: 'A link with hover underline.' } }; ``` 3. Add `ListItem` story: ```tsx const ListItem: Story = { render: () => (
    First list item Second list item
), }; ``` 4. Update AllHeadings to include a and li (rename to `AllVariants` for accuracy): ```tsx const AllVariants: Story = { render: () => (
h1 h2 h3 h4 h5 h6 paragraph anchor
    list item
), }; ``` 5. Update exports: replace `AllHeadings` with `AllVariants`, add `Anchor` and `ListItem`. Constraints: - Follow existing story patterns - Do NOT modify Text.tsx - When renaming AllHeadings to AllVariants, remove the old export name

userStories.title: Add positioning stories to Tooltip
userStories.description: Tooltip supports `side` (top/bottom/left/right) and `align` positioning props but no story demonstrates them. The existing stories all use the default positioning.
acceptanceCriteria: Tooltip.stories.tsx has a story named `Positions` showing tooltips on all four sides (top, bottom, left, right)
Each side variant renders with `defaultOpen` so the tooltip is visible without interaction
userStories.notes:
Files: - platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/retro/Tooltip.stories.tsx (add story) Context: TooltipContent in Tooltip.tsx accepts standard Radix TooltipPrimitive.Content props including `side` and `align` (inherited from `ComponentProps`). The CVA config includes slide-in animations per side (line 8): ```tsx 'data-[side=bottom]:slide-in-from-top-2 data-[side=left]:slide-in-from-right-2 data-[side=right]:slide-in-from-left-2 data-[side=top]:slide-in-from-bottom-2' ``` The existing stories use `defaultOpen` to show tooltips without interaction — follow this pattern. Changes: Add a `Positions` story that shows all four side variants: ```tsx const Positions: Story = { render: () => (
{(['top', 'right', 'bottom', 'left'] as const).map(side => ( {side} tooltip ))}
), }; ``` The grid layout with generous padding ensures tooltips on all sides have space to render without collision. Constraints: - Follow existing story patterns (TooltipDemo uses Tooltip.Provider with delayDuration={0}) - Use `defaultOpen` so tooltips are visible without interaction - Import Button from './Button' (already imported in the file) - Add to exports
